_meta.description: This file contains the data for the welcome section of the portfolio website, which is the first section a user sees. it includes a brief catchphrase/specialization, a summary of professional identity, and the call-to-action (CTA) button text and link.

fields.brief: A short, impactful statement about the owner's primary professional focus or specialization.
fields.summary: A more detailed but concise summary of the owner's professional background and goals, designed to provide context immediately upon landing on the site.
fields.ctaText: The text displayed on the primary call-to-action button (e.g., 'RESUME').
fields.ctaLink: The URL the CTA button redirects to (e.g., a link to the resume or a contact page).

welcome.brief: I specialise in engineering software solutions.
welcome.summary: A software engineer with a specialization in developing optimality-focused products tailored to address challenges and make life efficient.
